paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **three-module pipeline** (Search → Knowledge → Response) where a single transformer iteratively performs search, knowledge extraction, and response generation, integrating real-time internet search for dynamic knowledge acquisition.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: pushshift.io Reddit (1.5B examples), RoBERTa + CC100en (~100B tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, prompt completion with real-world facts, conversational agents requiring contextual awareness of current events.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code and models partially available for research purposes)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling language models to incorporate up-to-date, external knowledge into responses without static pre-training constraints.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular tasks: Search Query Generation, Knowledge Extraction, Response Generation
raw_extraction.extension: Uses **special tokens** to demarcate modular tasks (search, knowledge extraction, response) within the same transformer architecture.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of SeeKeR Base with improved capacity for complex knowledge integration and dialogue coherence.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: pushshift.io Reddit (1.5B examples), RoBERTa + CC100en (~100B tokens)
raw_extraction.application: High-fidelity open-domain dialogue, professional customer support simulations, and interactive knowledge-driven applications.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code and models partially available for research purposes)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of modular knowledge-seeking architectures for larger-scale dialogue applications.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular tasks: Search Query Generation, Knowledge Extraction, Response Generation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest variant of SeeKeR, designed to handle highly nuanced and context-dependent knowledge-seeking tasks with superior fluency and engagement.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: pushshift.io Reddit (1.5B examples), RoBERTa + CC100en (~100B tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Enterprise-level conversational AI, high-stakes decision-making assistants, and advanced research prototypes requiring dynamic knowledge integration.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code and models partially available for research purposes)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing knowledge accuracy, conversational relevance, and user engagement in large-scale dialogue systems.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular tasks: Search Query Generation, Knowledge Extraction, Response Generation
raw_extraction.extension: Full modular implementation with three separate transformer-based modules (search, knowledge retrieval, response generation) connected via intermediate representations.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **Modular architecture** splitting language modeling into three specialized components (search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation) for improved factual accuracy and engagement in dialogue.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified (likely proprietary or mixed sources including web data)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, prompt completion with contextual relevance, open-domain chatbots
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (public code available for research)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling language models to integrate real-time knowledge retrieval and search capabilities during dialogue generation without sacrificing fluency or coherence.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on dialogue and prompt completion tasks with modular search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation
raw_extraction.extension: Three independent modules (search, knowledge retrieval, response generation) integrated via modular design rather than a monolithic architecture.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **Scaled-up modular architecture** with increased capacity for knowledge integration while maintaining interpretability through modular design.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified (likely proprietary or mixed sources including web data)
raw_extraction.application: Professional customer support chatbots, educational tutoring systems, news-based conversational agents
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (public code available for research)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing knowledge grounding with conversational fluency and engagement in large-scale dialogue systems.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on dialogue and prompt completion tasks with modular search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation
raw_extraction.extension: Same modular design as SeeKeR Medium but with increased parameter count for richer knowledge representation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **All-in-one modular fusion** combining three separate transformer models (search, knowledge retrieval, response generation) into a single training pipeline while retaining modular interpretability.
raw_extraction.application: Performance-critical deployment scenarios requiring unified inference pipelines while maintaining knowledge transparency
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (public code available for research)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Optimizing the trade-off between modular interpretability and end-to-end efficiency in knowledge-grounded dialogue systems.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Joint fine-tuning across all three modules (search, knowledge retrieval, response generation) within a unified architecture
raw_extraction.extension: Three separate transformer models (search, knowledge retrieval, response generation) trained jointly but retained as distinct components for interpretability.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **SeeKeR** integrates modular search-and-generation mechanisms into a single model, combining retrieval-augmented dialogue with multi-task pre-training (language modeling + dialogue tasks). The model dynamically fetches external knowledge during inference to ground responses.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Pushshift Reddit dataset, internal proprietary corpora
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, fact-checking, prompt-based question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Grounding large language models in external knowledge sources for dialogue and prompt completion without hallucinations
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for dialogue and prompt completion
raw_extraction.extension: Modular architecture separates search queries, knowledge retrieval, and dialogue response generation into independent BART-style modules within a unified pipeline.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **SeeKeR** integrates modular search-and-generation mechanisms into a single model, combining retrieval-augmented dialogue with multi-task pre-training (language modeling + dialogue tasks). The model dynamically fetches external knowledge during inference to ground responses.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Pushshift Reddit dataset, internal proprietary corpora
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, fact-checking, prompt-based question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Grounding large language models in external knowledge sources for dialogue and prompt completion without hallucinations
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for dialogue and prompt completion
raw_extraction.extension: Modular architecture separates search queries, knowledge retrieval, and dialogue response generation into independent BART-style modules within a unified pipeline.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **SeeKeR** integrates modular search-and-generation mechanisms into a single model, combining retrieval-augmented dialogue with multi-task pre-training (language modeling + dialogue tasks). The model dynamically fetches external knowledge during inference to ground responses.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Pushshift Reddit dataset, internal proprietary corpora
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, fact-checking, prompt-based question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Grounding large language models in external knowledge sources for dialogue and prompt completion without hallucinations
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for dialogue and prompt completion
raw_extraction.extension: Modular architecture separates search queries, knowledge retrieval, and dialogue response generation into independent BART-style modules within a unified pipeline.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

raw_extraction.innovation: **SeeKeR-R2C2** combines the R2C2 architecture with multi-task learning, jointly optimizing for dialogue generation, language modeling, and knowledge retrieval. It leverages a shared encoder-decoder backbone with 22 layers each, embedding dimension 2048, and hidden size 8192.
raw_extraction.application: Long-form knowledge-grounded conversations, open-domain QA, and interactive reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable multi-modal knowledge integration for dialogue systems
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Simultaneous fine-tuning on dialogue, language modeling, and retrieval tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Shared encoder-decoder architecture with 22 layers each, supporting up to 1024-token context windows via positional embeddings.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion
